# Orbital Wool Pad

## Lambswool polishing pad for orbital polishing machines

When used in combination with Menzerna Heavy Cut polishes, the Menzerna Orbital Wool Pad removes scratches, sanding marks, and deep surface imperfections in the blink of an eye. This Premium lambswool polishing pad comprises an abrasive woolen pad with a foam interface. The short-haired lambswool is ideal for removing scratches with orbital polishing machines.

Accessories

### Processing

- Orbital 

### Volumes

| 90mm/3,5''

| 26913.099.001

| 140mm/5,5''

FAQ

## Questions & answers

Do you have a question? We have the answer. On our FAQ page you will find frequently asked questions with the corresponding answers.

[To the FAQs](/car-care/training-tips/faqs)

[How do I choose the right polishing pad?](javascript:;)

Which polishing pad is suitable is dependent on the surface composition, the type of paint, the type of machine, and the polish selected. Menzerna offers the right polishing pads for each of its polishes. Recommendations are available on each product’s detail page. [Product overview.](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories)

[What’s the difference between a sanding and a polishing pad?](javascript:;)

A sanding pad is designed specifically for sanding and features abrasive grit for material removal. Sanding pads are available with grit of different sizes.
A polishing pad is designed specifically for polishing and is usually made from foam, with various degrees of hardness to choose from, from hard to very soft. There are also lambswool polishing pads and microfiber pads. [To the Menzerna Pads.](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories)

[How much polish should be applied to the polishing pad?](javascript:;)

Recommendation for Menzerna polishes and a surface measuring 40 cm × 40 cm:

- Pad with a diameter of 95 mm: 3 to 4 pea-sized drops 
- Pad with a diameter of 150 mm: 5 pea-sized drops 
- Pad with a diameter of 180 mm: 6 to 7 pea-sized drops 

Always up to date

## Register for the newsletter now!

Subscribe now to the free Menzerna Newsletter and receive interesting tips and information about polishing.

[To the newsletter](/service/newsletter)

## Orbital Wool Pad

Specially developed lambswool polishing pad for orbital polishing machines. Assists orbital polishing machines in the removal of scratches. This long-lasting lambswool polishing pad has been developed for Menzerna abrasive polishes.
